title: Israelis Don’t Feel Much Like Victors in War With Iran
summary_full: The regime in Iran has not changed and the nuclear and missile threats have not been eliminated, leaving many Israelis to wonder what this was all for.
summary_public: The regime in Iran has not changed and the nuclear and missile threats have not been eliminated, leaving many Israelis to wonder what this was all for.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: the nuclear and missile threats have not been eliminated
